document_summary.executive_summary: ParentConnect is a bilingual digital platform that enables parents of 3,200 enrolled children across 12 childcare centres to manage enrolments, track daily activities and learning milestones, communicate with educators, and pay fees online. It addresses the operational inefficiency of paper-based workflows, verbal handoffs, and manual invoicing that currently consume 35% of centre administrators' time. The expected outcome is a 70% reduction in administrative processing time, 95% parent engagement rate, and full compliance with ECDA quarterly milestone reporting requirements within 12 months of launch.

content.execution_summary:
• Generated vision document for ParentConnect
• 5 sections: Executive Summary, Business Context, Full Scope Vision, MVP Scope, Risks & Dependencies
• 6 feature areas: Parent Portal, Enrolment Management, Daily Activity & Learning, Fee Management, Educator Tools, ECDA Compliance Reporting
• 10 MVP features (Must Have: 7, Should Have: 3)
• 6 risks identified (PDPA compliance: critical, ECDA integration complexity: high)
• 5 open questions flagged for requirements analysis
• Grounded in kb-L2-early-childhood-education-domain (85% coverage — enrolment lifecycle, fee structures, ECDA reporting, parent personas all sourced from KB)
• Reflection: fixed 2 metrics that said 'improve' without targets, added missing PDPA constraint to Business Constraints, strengthened ECDA integration points with specific API references from KB
• Uploaded to /a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890/vision-doc/vision-parentconnect.md
